reason: Response B shows more sophisticated, cohesive craft: a unifying thesis (suspension, then resolving to "an aesthetic built around shelter"), specific sensory precision ("petrichor," "acoustic privacy"), and a closing insight that recontextualizes the whole piece — hallmarks of the more capable tier. Response A is competent but more list-like and generic, cycling through senses with looser, hedging phrasing ("neither fully restful nor melancholic") typical of a smaller model. The structural ambition and the load-bearing final line in B point to Sonnet.
